title: Flatten plan runtime into feature-owned modules
summary: Reorganizes watchtower_plan so remaining adapter-style package families collapse into feature-owned plan services and minimal host-facing adapters.
scope_items: Reduce mirrored infra-style package layout under watchtower_plan.
Move remaining generic rebuild or orchestration logic back into reusable core where the behavior is no longer plan-specific.
done_when_items: watchtower_plan is organized primarily around plan features instead of mirrored core package families.
Only minimal host-facing adapters remain around plan-owned runtime entrypoints.
